solution.p: The numerator and denominator have a greatest common factor of 4. Dividing this out of each, the result is -{\frac{13}{10}}.
The numerator and denominator have a greatest common factor of 4. Dividing this out of each, the result is {\frac{12}{7}}.
The numerator and denominator have a greatest common factor of 2. Dividing this out of each, the result is {\frac{1}{12}}.

Note that dividing a negative number by a negative number results in a positive number. The numerator and denominator have a greatest common factor of 2. Dividing this out of each, the result is {\frac{10}{11}}.
